refinement_sections.content: The company has a customer database with over a million records, and queries are running slowly. I need to understand what kind of queries are slow and why they are slow.
I will look at how the current indexing is set up. This means checking which fields are indexed and if they are the right ones for the queries being run.
I need to think about a new indexing approach. This might mean adding more indexes or changing existing ones to make queries faster.
I will consider how the new indexes could affect the time it takes to add or change records in the database, since more indexes can slow this down.
I need to think about if there are any risks to the data being correct when I change the indexing strategy.
The report will include my proposed indexing strategy, how it could improve performance, and any possible downsides or trade-offs.
